title: Kaliningrad, Kaliningrad Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kaliningrad, Kaliningrad Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kaliningrad is a city in Kaliningrad Oblast with a population of 490,000. Russia’s Baltic exclave, a unique city with a mix of German and Russian heritage, home to the Amber Museum and Königsberg Cathedral.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
